title: CoconutGens: Biome Outpost
description: Outposts with different biome variants, improved loot, and some extras
body:
**welcome to the first installment of a series of datapacks that I plan to release under the name of coconutgens; (it will be called coconutgens because I like coconuts. so dont expect palm trees with coconuts)**

**Biome Outpost is an Datapack which adds more Pillager Outposts set in different biomes:**

**-Plains**

**-Taiga**

**-Snowy Plains**

**-Desert**

**-Savanna**

**-Jungle**

**-Grove (vanilla outpost at the moment)**

The Datapack is an recreation of an deleted datapack Created by [Enders Host](https://www.planetminecraft.com/member/enders_host/) for the 1.14, afortunally i have saved in
my hard disk this one so i ask Ender Host permissions for Recreate his datapack!


<details>
<summary>Enders Host permission</summary>

![Enders Host permission](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9b0a3c3eebff93fe6b1bce91513ee619bbd0e735.png)

</details>



I originally uploaded this Data Pack to [Planet Minecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/coconutgens-biome-outpost/), but since there can only be one file, I decided to move it here.
